stays.name: Casa Cabane
stays.description: The first guided stay: real walkthrough footage, chaptered controls, Airbnb-informed details, and a clear path into the atmosphere.

stays.name: Next waterside stay
stays.description: A future stay can join this collection once footage, photos, booking link, practical details, and story angle are ready.

stays.name: Hidden garden retreat
stays.description: The system is made to hold multiple stays without forcing guests into a listing dashboard.

productionLanes: Casa Cabane as the first proof-of-feel
Property pages with full Airbnb-level detail
Amigo guidance for collection and stay questions
A future host cockpit for Maaike & Laudi
Direct booking only after availability, payments, rules, and support are real

amigoSystem.title: Guest guide
amigoSystem.text: Amigo helps visitors choose a stay, understand practical details, and move from atmosphere to booking without menu diving.

amigoSystem.title: Host cockpit
amigoSystem.text: Later, Maaike & Laudi can use Amigo to centralize questions, Airbnb messages, direct inquiries, rules, and stay updates.

amigoSystem.title: Direct booking bridge
amigoSystem.text: The website can start with Airbnb handoff, then evolve into independent booking once live inventory and payment logic are approved.

amigoPrompts.label: Which stay should I open first?
amigoPrompts.answer: Start with Casa Cabane. It is the only stay with real walkthrough video, public Airbnb trust data, and a guided detail page in this prototype.

amigoPrompts.label: How does booking work now?
amigoPrompts.answer: For now, House of Wander guides the decision and Airbnb handles live dates, payment, rules, cancellation, and guest-host messaging.

amigoPrompts.label: What changes later?
amigoPrompts.answer: Later, Amigo can connect the collection, guest questions, host operations, Airbnb messages, and direct booking. That backend is planned, not active yet.

amigoPrompts.label: Can you guide without menus?
amigoPrompts.answer: Yes. The goal is that guests can ask Amigo for the right stay, the practical details, the booking path, or the difference between Airbnb now and direct booking later instead of digging through a dashboard.
